message:
fix(sqlite): update fsqlite to latest and propagate id_exists errors in create

Two fixes for SQLite corruption issues (#138, #139, #140, #144, #145):

1. Update fsqlite dependency from commit 619d8697 to dbb87490 (latest
   main), picking up critical btree cursor, MVCC, WAL, and concurrency
   fixes that address the shared root cause of all 5 open corruption
   issues.

2. Fix error-swallowing in create.rs where `id_exists().unwrap_or(false)`
   silently treated database errors as "ID doesn't exist", risking ID
   collisions that overwrite data. Now captures and propagates errors
   using Cell<Option<String>> since the `generate` closure requires
   `Fn(&str) -> bool`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
